positive: Minimalist abstract celestial fox silhouette, sitting gracefully atop a stylized crescent moon. The fox should have glowing, ethereal tails and delicate, flowing fur rendered in geometric vector art lines. Background should be a deep midnight blue gradient with subtle constellations and scattered geometric star particles. Focus on high contrast between the glowing subject and the dark background. Art style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets clean graphic vector illustration. Composition: Central, symmetrical, designed for print on apparel. Lighting: Dramatic, internal glow emanating from the fox's silhouette and the moon. Color palette: Deep blues, indigo, silver, and warm gold highlights.
negative: blurry, low quality, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg compression, grayscale, cluttered, cartoon, photo, realistic
